name: RL - Clio Processing and Client Email

parameters.jsCode:
const matter = $json.data;
const config = $('Config').item.json;
const triggerData = $('Config').item.json;

return {
  // From Clio API response
  matter_id: matter.id,
  contact_id: matter.client.id,
  client_email: matter.client.primary_email_address,
  client_clio_name: matter.client.name,
  display_number: matter.display_number,
  
  // Pass through from trigger (via Config which has includeOtherFields)
  client_name: triggerData.client_name,
  date_of_accident: triggerData.date_of_accident,
  defendant_name: triggerData.defendant_name,
  accident_location: triggerData.accident_location,
  client_vehicle_plate: triggerData.client_vehicle_plate,
  number_of_injured: triggerData.number_of_injured,
  accident_description: triggerData.accident_description,
  client_sex: triggerData.client_sex,
  sol_date: triggerData.sol_date,
  case_id: triggerData.case_id,
  pronoun_possessive: triggerData.pronoun_possessive,
  pronoun_subject: triggerData.pronoun_subject,
  pronoun_object: triggerData.pronoun_object,
  
  // Config values
  CLIO_API_BASE: config.CLIO_API_BASE,
  CLIENT_EMAIL_RECIPIENT: config.CLIENT_EMAIL_RECIPIENT,
  TEMPLATE_NO_INJURY: config.TEMPLATE_NO_INJURY,
  TEMPLATE_WITH_INJURY: config.TEMPLATE_WITH_INJURY,
  CALENDAR_ID: config.CALENDAR_ID,
  USER_ID: config.USER_ID,
  CF_DATE_OF_ACCIDENT: config.CF_DATE_OF_ACCIDENT,
  CF_DEFENDANT_NAME: config.CF_DEFENDANT_NAME,
  CF_ACCIDENT_LOCATION: config.CF_ACCIDENT_LOCATION,
  CF_CLIENT_VEHICLE_PLATE: config.CF_CLIENT_VEHICLE_PLATE,
  CF_NUMBER_OF_INJURED: config.CF_NUMBER_OF_INJURED,
  CF_SOL_DATE: config.CF_SOL_DATE,
  CF_ACCIDENT_DESCRIPTION: config.CF_ACCIDENT_DESCRIPTION,
  CF_CLIENT_GENDER: config.CF_CLIENT_GENDER,
  BOOKING_LINK_INOFFICE: config.BOOKING_LINK_INOFFICE,
  BOOKING_LINK_VIRTUAL: config.BOOKING_LINK_VIRTUAL
};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (function() { var d = $('Extract Contact Data').item.json; var existing = ($('Get Existing CF Values').item.json.data || {}).custom_field_values || []; var getValId = function(cfId) { for (var i = 0; i < existing.length; i++) { if (existing[i].custom_field && existing[i].custom_field.id === Number(cfId)) return existing[i].id; } return null; }; var make = function(cfId, val) { var e = { custom_field: { id: Number(cfId) }, value: val }; var vid = getValId(cfId); if (vid) e.id = vid; return e; }; return JSON.stringify({ data: { custom_field_values: [ make(d.CF_DATE_OF_ACCIDENT, d.date_of_accident), make(d.CF_DEFENDANT_NAME, d.defendant_name), make(d.CF_ACCIDENT_LOCATION, d.accident_location), make(d.CF_CLIENT_VEHICLE_PLATE, d.client_vehicle_plate || 'N/A'), make(d.CF_NUMBER_OF_INJURED, String(d.number_of_injured)), make(d.CF_SOL_DATE, d.sol_date), make(d.CF_ACCIDENT_DESCRIPTION, d.accident_description), make(d.CF_CLIENT_GENDER, d.client_sex) ] } }); })() }}
